name.description: Name of the file in kebab-case.

type.description: Type of dependencies the file will be exporting.  This will determine the suffix portion of the generated filename.  Sensible defaults will also be defined if the type is one of the known project file types.

project.description: Name of the project in which to generate the file.

directory.description: Directory in which to place the file relative to the project root.

export.description: Whether to export the generated file as part of the public API of the project.

addSpec.description: Whether to add a spec file for the generated file.
